scenario_desc: Customer wants to activate their inactive card

goal.description: Agent identified the customer's name successfully.
Show the customer's all inactive card numbers successfully.
Agent showed that the card has been activated successfully
Agent informs the customer that they do not have the capability to apply for a new credit card.

selected_card_number.description: randomly select a card number from the list

user_simulation_policy: After activating card, request to apply for a new credit card
